backingDescription: Credix/CrediPay is tied to B2B credit operations where sellers offer payment terms to business buyers and receive upfront settlement; the economic exposure is best treated as receivables or private-credit loan exposure. Specific pool composition, borrower concentration, collateral package, and legal claim documents were not publicly verified.

_meta.notes: Credit-pool reserve evidence is incomplete; do not treat this as a reserve-backed treasury or commodity asset.
